aesthetic: Monochrome, Developer OS, Production-ready, Cyber, Minimalist

spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Strict bento-like alignment. Minimalist.

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

badges.style: border border-white/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

layout.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Minimalist logo, clear navigation links.
layout.dashboard: Sidebar nav (w-64) + main content area. Control-room grid (tight gaps, high density) for Kanbans.
layout.kanban: Horizontal scrollable flex container. Columns with card layout. Minimal borders to avoid clutter.

motion.hover: Subtle opacity and background color changes. Slight scale-up (scale-[1.02]) for interactive cards.

images.description: Abstract geometric black and white hero composition for the landing page.
Minimalist black and white conceptual art for pipelines/workflow steps.
Abstract architectural lines converging. Good for section backgrounds or card covers.
Minimalist workspace to represent the Execution platform in the about/features section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on black backgrounds. Minimum 7:1 ratio.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none for all interactive elements.
accessibility.testId: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the pure black-and-white (monochrome) theme.
Avoid using generic brand colors (like blue or purple). Everything should be grayscale/black/white. Use opacity for disabled/muted states.
Implement the landing page with high-contrast, large geometric typography. Set the main background to `#000000`.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide, maintaining a precise weight (e.g., 1.5px or light variant) to match the Dev OS vibe.
For the Client, Executor, and Admin dashboards, use strict bento or list grids. Utilize the 1px border cards with `rounded-[12px]`.
Ensure buttons are heavily rounded (`rounded-[24px]`) to exactly match the 20-28px criteria from the problem statement.
Kanban board should feel technical and precise. Use data-dense layouts with mono-spaced typography (`font-mono`) for task tags or IDs.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every button, link, input, and key container as per the critical rules.
